# Vendored dependencies

Files here are **generated copies** bundled so that `agoragentic-harness-core`
is self-contained when installed from npm (the published tarball cannot reach
files outside the package directory).

## `guard-core.mjs`

Byte-for-byte copy of `guard-core/src/index.mjs` from the repository root.
It has no third-party dependencies (only Node built-ins), so a copy is safe.

**Do not edit this file by hand.** Edit the canonical source at
`guard-core/src/index.mjs` and re-copy. The packaging test
(`tests/harness-core-packaging.test.js`) fails if the two drift apart.

To refresh:

```bash
cp guard-core/src/index.mjs packages/harness-core/src/vendor/guard-core.mjs
```

Longer term this should be promoted to a published `@agoragentic/guard-core`
package and consumed as a normal dependency; vendoring is the no-publish-needed
interim that keeps `npx agoragentic-harness-core` working standalone.
